meaning: n.[微生物] 葡萄状球菌
examples: This is a super-antibiotic resistant Staphylococcus epidermidis disease.
Positive blood culture was found in 71 patients (57.7%) of viridans streptococci (32.4%), staphylococcus epidermidis (15.5%).
The detection rate of Staphylococcus saprophyticus was the highest in secretion of omphalitis, and the next was Escherichia coli.
Disease-causing organisms such as staphylococcus aureus and pneumonia-causing bacteria have been detected in paper bills.
Drug-resistant strains of everything from tuberculosis to staphylococcus are killing tens of thousands of patients every year.
